titleStmt.title: SII 28.119: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 119. (A.R. No. 274 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, south wall.

Some portion at the right end of the line of the lines of the inscription is not available. Records the order (olai) issued by the king, and addressed to a number of officials connected with the temple administration confirming as tirunāmattukkāṇi, land allotted for various services, (pūśai and tiruppaṇi) of God Dēvargaḷ-nāyaṉār. The amount of rice, salt and oil for the lamp to be measured out by the (standard) measure, Irājakēsari, on account of the lands mentioned are also specified. It was ordered that in respect of the lands allotted as tirunandavanppuṟam for the maintenance (Jīvanam) (of those tending a flower-garden of all vargams will be exempted in the same way as had been done in the case of the tirunandavanappuṟam set up by Śvāmi-dēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 5 1000 8 10 2 � villarāyaṉ Olai teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum vikramacoḻa brahmārāyarum vikrama pāṇṭiya brahmārāyarum jayatuṅka pallavaraiyarum kurukulattaraiyarum Eṉātiyaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañceyvārkaḷum koyilContinuation of lines missing
lai nāyakaṉ perum paṇṭārattārum Eṇṇai ppaṇṭārattārum paṇṭārappottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu nāyakar kulottuṅka coḻaṉ tiruttoppukku Eḻuntaruḷum kulottuṅka coḻaṉ teṅku tiruvitiyil teṉ talaiyil Ittiruvitikku meṟkku Etirilicoḻaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakku Uṭaiyār tiruppataṅkāṭṭīśvaramuṭaiyār tirukkoyilukkuk kiḻppakkattu naṭuvuḷppaṭ
ruḷa paṇṇiṉa nāyanār tevarkaḷ nāyaṉārkkup pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Irājādhirājavaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyākap patinālāvatu mutal pukunta cātaṉapaṭi Uḷppaṭi » �yul viruvu » � 1muntiri ta mukkāl � yum Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukāṇiyākap pukutukaiyil Iṉṉilam muṉpu mañcakkuṭaiyāṉ tirunokkaḻakiyarāṉa to
kkaṉārkku perum(p)paṟṟappuliyūr Eri Uḷvāyil tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilam Iṉṉāyaṉārkkup pūcaikku ppaṇṭārattu viṭum Ariciyum Uppum Eṇṇaiyum viṭukiṟa Itukku Uṭalāka tirukkai Oṭṭi paṇṭārattuc cātaṉam Oṭukkikkoṇṭu mutaliyārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka ppalapaṇi nimantakkāṟarkku jivitam Aṭaittuk koṇṭapaṭiye mutaliyārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Ivarkaḷ kaiyil cātaṉam tirukkai
tam Aṭaittukkoṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār tevarkaḷ nāyaṉārkku pūcaikku Iṉṉāḷ mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukkup pūrikkuttal Arici kuṟuṇiyum(p) pūri Uppu Uriyum tiruviḷakkeṇṇai Uḻakkum paṇṭāraṅkaḷ toṟum celavu virācakecariyāle viṭavum Ivamutaliyārkkum nācciyārkkum cātti Aruḷa tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalākat tiruppaḷḷittāmam Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Aḷakkuṅ kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ tiruttoppil teṉpakkattil
kaḷḷukku jivaṉattukku tirunantavaṉappuṟat tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākap pukunta cātaṉappaṭiye perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai Accoccāttāṅkuṭiyāṉa mahipālakulakāla nallūril Ūrppaṭi » (1/2)l virivu » (1/2)satta mukkāl �m 10 4vatu Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Iṉṉilattukkut tevar cuvāmi tevar ceyvitta tirunantavaṉappuṟattukkuc ceytu varukiṟapaṭiye puṟa Uṭal Aṉaittu vaṟkkaṅkaḷum tavintu tirunantavaṉappuṟat tiruna
Ippaṭi candrādittavaraiyum celvatāka tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi ceyappaṇṇuvate Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ḥ §
Digital edition of SII 28.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
